name: Zombie Town Breakout
short_description: Zombie Town Breakout is a top-down survival action game set in a zombie-infested ruined town. Scavenge for weapons, recruit survivors with unique abilities, assemble your team, explore the ruins, defend your stronghold, and fight for survival!
detailed_description:
Thank you everyone for your tremendous support. We're a newly established studio that created this game out of our passion for zombie and shooter games. Zombie Town Breakout embodies the collective effort of our team. While we're aware the game still has many flaws and shortcomings, we hope to continuously improve it through Early Access. We'll sincerely listen to feedback and learn from the guidance of experienced players like you.

Welcome to Zombie Town Breakout, an intense top-down survival action game where you must lead survivors through a town overrun by zombies. For survival, for hope—pick up your weapons and break through the hordes!

Once a thriving town, now a playground for the undead. As one of the few survivors, you must take charge and seek hope in this desolate wasteland. The intuitive top-down perspective lets you command the battlefield effortlessly, whether slashing through enemies with cold steel or switching to blazing firearms for ranged combat—all delivering exhilarating action.

Venture into dangerous ruins to scavenge supplies and powerful weapons to boost your survival chances. Most importantly, you’re not alone! Along your journey, you’ll encounter other survivors with unique skills. Recruit them to strengthen your team and gain unexpected advantages. Expand your squad, upgrade gear, and survive the relentless zombie onslaught.

Zombie Town Breakout features meticulously designed levels, including exploration maps full of unknowns and strategic stronghold defense challenges. In exploration missions, delve into zombie territories to rescue survivors and gather resources. In defense missions, withstand waves of frenzied attacks—strategize formations, utilize terrain, and protect your survivors at all costs.

Core Features:

  • Seamless Weapon Switching: Flexibly alternate between melee weapons and ranged firearms to tackle diverse zombie threats and forge your combat style. Recruit Unique Survivors: Discover skilled survivors in the ruins and build a formidable team.

  • Scavenge & Upgrade Gear: Explore ruins for weapons, ammo, and supplies. Continuously upgrade equipment to enhance your team’s strength against escalating threats.

  • Diverse Level Design: Experience varied maps, from exploration-focused ruins to pulse-pounding stronghold defenses, ensuring fresh challenges every time.

  • Exploration & Defense Fusion: Master both scavenging and tactical defense in a dual-layered survival experience.

  • Post-Apocalyptic Aesthetic: Immerse yourself in crumbling ruins and a haunting atmosphere of despair.

Ready? Grab your weapons, rally survivors, and break out of Zombie Town to reclaim humanity’s last hope!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
